propositions: Add a required-environment op-cert verification lane that mirrors the identity merge-gate, reusing the merged-log walk and config-driven posture/boundary instead of a parallel walker.

The verify-opcert CLI groups merged-log events by ticket, verifies each in-scope ticket's completion-verifier op-cert, and exits 1 iff an enforced ticket lacks a valid required-environment op-cert, else exits 0 (advisory).
Grandfathering for the missing-op-cert case anchors enforcement on the introducing commit of the ticket's terminal close STATUS event, tested against verify.opcert_enforce_since.

The verifier must trust only signed envelope contents and state it recomputes itself: material_fingerprint is recomputed from authoritative ticket state and merged_log_commit is taken verify-then-extract, constrained to be an ancestor of gated HEAD.

Era key-validity must be evaluated at the cert's storage anchor S (introducing commit of the envelope-bearing SIGNATURE event) rather than its self-chosen merged_log_commit, preventing a revoked-key rollback bypass.
Era boundaries in trusted_environments.yaml become tickets-branch log positions stamped by a rebar trusted-env helper, with unresolvable anchors and revocation-without-pin failing closed.
